# MuleSoft JSON Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.5) of JSON Module documentation.
> See [JSON Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/json-module/llms-full.txt) for all the JSON Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [JSON Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/json-module/latest/index.md)
- [Troubleshooting JSON Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/json-module/latest/json-module-troubleshooting.md)
- [JSON Module Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/json-module/latest/json-reference.md)
- [Validating Documents Against a JSON Schema with the JSON Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/json-module/latest/json-schema-validation.md)
- [JSON Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/json-module/latest/json-xml-maven.md)
